subject: Faz 7 Tamamlandi: Binance Real Trading Engine
body:
## Faz 7 Implementation Ozeti

### Yapilan Degisiklikler

**Yeni Dosyalar:**
- `src/CryptoTrader/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance/Abstractions/IBinanceOrderService.cs` — Spot order port interface (PlaceMarket, PlaceLimit, Cancel, GetCurrentPrice)
- `src/CryptoTrader/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance/Services/BinanceOrderService.cs` — IBinanceRestClient.SpotApi.Trading adapter, Polly v8 resilience (timeout+retry+circuit breaker)
- `src/CryptoTrader/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance/Adapters/BinanceEngine.cs` — ITradingEngine implementation, real API order gonderimi, AllowedSymbols whitelist, MaxPositionSize cap
- `tests/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance.Tests/` — Yeni test projesi (solution'a eklendi)
- `tests/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance.Tests/Engines/BinanceEngineTests.cs` — 7 unit test
- `tests/Traxon.CryptoTrader.Binance.Tests/Services/BinanceOrderServiceTests.cs` — 5 unit test (NSubstitute ile IBinanceRestClient deep mock)

**Degistirilen Dosyalar:**
- `BinanceOptions.cs` — Enabled(default=false), ApiKey, ApiSecret, MaxPositionSize, AllowedSymbols alanlari eklendi
- `DependencyInjection.cs` — Kosullu kayit: Enabled=true oldugunda IBinanceOrderService+BinanceEngine kaydi, BinanceCredentials ile credential setup
- `Worker/appsettings.json` — Binance section'a yeni alanlar eklendi (Enabled=false)

### Guvenlik
- `Enabled = false` default — hicbir gercek order gonderilemez
- `AllowedSymbols` whitelist — sadece izin verilen sembollerde islem
- `MaxPositionSize = 100 USDT` cap — buyuk pozisyon riski yok

### Test Sonuclari
- **13 yeni test** — hepsi yesil
- **54 mevcut Infrastructure test** — hepsi hala yesil
- Toplam: 67 test, 0 hata

### Build
- `dotnet build` — 0 hata, 0 uyari (Worker dahil tum CryptoTrader projeleri)

### Git
- Branch: `feature/phase7-binance-trading` → `main` (no-ff merge)
- Commit: `feat: Faz 7 — Binance Real Trading Engine`
- Push: `origin/main` guncellendi

### Onemli Not: CryptoExchange.Net 11.x Uyumluluk
- `ApiCredentials` abstract oldugu icin `BinanceCredentials(key, secret)` kullanildi
- `AddBinance(opts => opts.Rest.ApiCredentials = ...)` pattern kullanildi
- `WebCallResult<T>` test helper'i `ErrorInfo(ErrorType.InvalidParameter, ...)` ile olusturuldu
